classification.reason: Microsoft now closes the main contract gap by publishing the exact TimeStampEnabled policy path and enable/disable semantics. The decompiled reader still supplies the companion TimeStampInterval logic and 24-hour cap, and the 25H2 follow-up work keeps the current-build DiagTrack lead in repo evidence. That is enough to treat the app's gate-plus-cap pair as an app-ready policy mapping even though the live Procmon pass still narrows to an adjacent Reliability branch instead of the exact target values.
